text.title: MVP Scoping Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of MVP Scoping.

example.scenario: Solo founder names risk 'engineers will pay $19/mo'; draws minimum journey (signup → demo → checkout); cuts SSO, settings, analytics; kill = <2 paid in 14d; ships 9d later; 3 paid → continue.
